arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Dyche leaves Everton and Potter prepares for first game
arts.sum: Everton started life after Sean Dyche by booking a spot in the FA Cup fourth round, while new West Ham boss Graham Potter got set for his first game.

arts.ttl: David Moyes: Everton owners set date to appoint new manager after Sean Dyche sacking?
arts.sum: Everton's new owners - the Friedkin Group - reportedly set a date for when they wish to appoint a new manager, with ex-Toffees boss David Moyes emerging as their top target to replace Sean Dyche.

arts.ttl: Leighton Baines praises Everton response after victory on ‘difficult day’
arts.sum: The club’s new owners the Friedkin Group look set to bring back David Moyes.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's son slammed after denying Ashley Young's son chance to make history
arts.sum: Ashley Young, 39, did not get to play against his 18-year-old son Tyler in Everton's FA Cup tie against Peterborough after the teenager was not brought off the bench by manager Darren Ferguson

arts.ttl: Everton 2-0 Peterborough: Leighton Baines issues Armando Broja injury update, reacts to Sean Dyche sacking, David Moyes rumours
arts.sum: Leighton Baines reflects on a "difficult day" that ended on a high with Everton beating Peterborough United 2-0 in the FA Cup third round on Thursday night, just hours after the sacking of Sean Dyche.

arts.ttl: Football Daily bonus: Everton roll the Dyche
arts.sum: Eleanor Oldroyd reacts to Everton sacking Sean Dyche.

arts.ttl: 'Everton need stability' - how chaotic day unfolded
arts.sum: Everton sacked manager Sean Dyche hours before their FA Cup tie against Peterborough - this is how a chaotic day unfolded at the club.

arts.ttl: Leighton Baines makes Everton job admission and explains Sean Dyche sack message to players
arts.sum: Leighton Baines led Everton to a 2-0 victory over Peterborough United after Sean Dyche's sacking

arts.ttl: Baines reflects on 'unique day' as Everton interim manager
arts.sum: Leighton Baines reflects on a "unique day" after his first game as interim manager for Everton in their 2-0 victory over Peterborough United in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Everton overcome Peterborough after Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Premier League strugglers Everton began their post-Sean Dyche era with victory over League One Peterborough in the FA Cup third round.
